subcodes.first_line: The breeze of the All-Merciful hath wafted from the direction of the Prison, and the ocean of utterance surgeth through this Most Great Name. Blessed is he who hath found [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد هبت نسمه الرحمن من شطر السجن و تموج بحر البیان بهذا الاسم العظیم طوبی لمن وجد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @importance of prayer
